title: neolloydia lophophoroides
intro: Neolloydia lophophoroides, also known as the evening star cactus, is a rare and unique succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neolloydia lophophoroides include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and potentially treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and powdering the stems or roots, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
